requirements: and(executed_by(tree, 'provide WpHG Customer Information', 'customer advisor'), executed_by(tree, 'provide Basic Information Securities and Capital Investment', 'customer advisor'))
and(leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send customer legitimation'), leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send account documents'))
and(executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor'), condition_directly_follows(tree, 'customerAdvisor.securitiesCompetence >= "C"', 'conduct investment advice'))

and(executed_by(tree, 'handle customer identification', 'customer advisor'), executed_by(tree, 'handle customer legitimation', 'customer advisor'), executed_by(tree, 'check suspected money laundering case', 'anti-money-laundering officer'))
precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve suspected anti-money laundering case')
